name: NovelStem International Corp.
business: NovelStem International Corp. is a holding company whose principal asset consists of rights to profits from a license held by Yissum Research Development Company for stem cell technology originally developed by Hebrew University. The company currently conducts no other business and has no operating revenue. It retains a financial interest of up to $3,750,000 in any future licensing of this technology.

exposures.sentence: NewStem established a discovery bio-platform based on haploid human embryonic stem cell technology for genome-wide screenings and is currently using this platform for the discovery and development of oncology drugs based on synthetic lethal interaction and developing a personalized diagnostic for early detection of chemotherapy resistance.
NewStem filed an FDA Pre-Submission and received a CE Mark from the European Medicines Agency (EMA) for its in vitro diagnostic device (IVDD).
The NewStem Software Diagnostic Device (NSDD) is CE marked under EU regulation as an other IVD under Directive 98/79/EC since March 2022.
